name: Weak Healing Potion
description: A berry-flavoured tonic that restores 7 health.

name: Medium Healing Potion
description: A concentrated draught that restores 15 health.

name: Strong Healing Potion
description: A potent elixir that restores 25 health.

name: Potion of Might
description: Floods your muscles with strength, adding to your attacks for a while.

name: Potion of Speed
description: Quickens your every move, letting you act faster than your foes.

name: Potion of Regeneration
description: Knits your wounds closed over the coming turns.

name: Potion of Curing
description: Purges poison and other ailments from your body.
